title: Octarrhena filiformis
taxonomy: Octarrhena filiformis is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a genus of orchids that is native to Australia and New Guinea. The Orchidaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants in the world. This family includes over 30,000 known species, many of which are still undescribed. Octarrhena filiformis is a member of the Orchideae subfamily within the Orchidaceae family.
